rationale: The only linkage provided is a single DOI-matched reference (no in-text citation context or reference text), so there is no direct evidence of how the 2006 paper is used in the 2013 article. The two notes suggest partial thematic overlap (U.S. consumption/lifestyle dynamics) but also substantial differences in unit and method (individual leisure MDCEV dynamics vs. household life-stage HMM), making substantive reliance unclear from current evidence.
